headline: We need to get used to the idea that code/software can now be disposable Some examples (all are discarded after usage): 1. Creating design playgrounds/modals for yourself to fine-tune the look and feel of a design 2. Creating HTML pages to help you understand the code 3. Spinning up a throwaway dashboard to inspect something once
Bet on every model at once https://t.co/5riTzhZSBs https://t.co/LaZUJih4RZ

Whenever someone asks me "I'm just getting started with posting content on social media; what should I talk about?" My answer is: What are the top 3 questions that you get asked most frequently by friends/acquaintances/colleagues? Turn those answers into videos/posts. Just say it like how you said it to them in real life. That is your positioning. If you have repeatedly said something for >3 times, it's worth turning into a video One of my initial motivations for posting on social media was because I was tired of repeating myself in real life
蚂蚁灵波发布全栈2.0：药房分拣初步跑通，但替代人工仍有长路
abstract: 2026WAIC期间，蚂蚁灵波在AGI基础设施与普惠实践论坛上披露，面向机器人的具身动作模型可实现90-150Hz推理频率，灵波2.0支持的机器人构型已由9种扩展至近20种，并在药房分拣等场景开展试点。不过，多位嘉宾认为，当前具身智能距离大规模商业化仍面临稳定性、异常处理、工程适配和成本账等挑战，收入、订单和业绩指引尚未披露。

机器人“ChatGPT时刻”最快两年！智元姚卯青：先跨过数据、表征与闭环“三堵墙”
abstract: 在论坛上，智元合伙人姚卯青首次系统披露"模型+数据"技术飞轮，披露3C产线成功率99.99%、百台机器人分布式强化学习等核心数据。压轴圆桌上，六位大咖激辩Scaling Law"物理墙"，VLA与世界模型路线之争现场交锋，并对机器人"ChatGPT时刻"给出2至5年的时间预判。
